ascii_query::FrameInfo(3) Library Functions Manual ascii_query::FrameInfo(3)

NAME

ascii_query::FrameInfo - Stack frame information.

SYNOPSIS

#include <src/tooling/query/lldb_controller.h>

Data Fields


uint32_t index
Frame index (0 = innermost). std::string function
Function name. std::string file
Source file. uint32_t line
Line number. uint64_t pc
Program counter. uint64_t fp
Frame pointer.

Detailed Description

Stack frame information.

Definition at line 61 of file lldb_controller.h.
